title: Use a separate pre-season testing regime
summary: The dataset includes Pre-Season Testing, where teams follow custom run plans, tyre usage, fuel loads, and pit-stop practice rather than race strategy constraints.
rationale: The dataset includes Pre-Season Testing, where teams follow custom run plans, tyre usage, fuel loads, and pit-stop practice rather than race strategy constraints. Treating testing rows like grands prix can inject label noise into rule and tyre-window features.
implementation_hint: Add IsTesting and train either a small testing-only expert or regime interaction features. Suppress mandatory-compound debt features for testing, rely more on TyreLife resets, stint/run length, current PitStop, and driver-run cadence.
expected_effect: Improves rows from testing sessions and reduces overfitting of race-specific rules to non-race behavior.
risk: Testing rows may be few; a separate expert can overfit unless blended conservatively or backed by CV grouped by session.
